opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My leg is swollen, burning hot, and hurts to walk on, and I've been shivering with a fever all afternoon.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A rapidly spreading hot red painful lower leg with fever and shivering.

symptom_narrative.onset: insect bite on the shin 48 hours ago; redness spreading fast over 12 hours
symptom_narrative.character: hot, swollen, tender spreading redness of the lower leg
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: very painful, hard to walk, shivering with fever
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right lower leg, ankle up to mid-calf
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: struggling to bear weight on the leg

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: insect bite acted as the entry point; spouse at home

communication_style.typical_message_style: unwell, focused on the leg and fever

objective_data_offered.value: a large hot, red, swollen tender area on the lower leg spreading upward from a little scabbed insect bite; the skin looks like orange-peel
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot palpate, feel for crepitus or mark the border
